name: numman-ali/n-skills
description: Curated plugin marketplace for AI agents - works with Claude Code, Codex, and openskills
author: numman-ali

source.readme:
**Curated by [Numman Ali](https://x.com/nummanali)** [![Twitter Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/nummanali?style=social)](https://x.com/nummanali) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-Apache%202.0-blue.svg)](LICENSE) [![agentskills.io](https://img.shields.io/badge/format-agentskills.io-purple.svg)](https://agentskills.io) [![AGENTS.md](https://img.shields.io/badge/discovery-AGENTS.md-green.svg)](https://www.infoq.com/news/2025/08/agents-md/) **One marketplace. Every agent.** [Install](#-quick-start) В· [Skills](#-available-skills) В· [Submit a Skill](#-want-to-be-featured) В· [Philosophy](#-philosophy)
--- ## рҹ’Ў Philosophy > **"Write once. Run everywhere."** AI coding agents are evolving fast, and each has its own way of doing things: ``` Claude Code вҶ’ CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills/ GitHub Copilot вҶ’ AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md Codex вҶ’ SKILL.md, ~/.codex/skills/ Cursor вҶ’ .cursor/rules/*.mdc Windsurf вҶ’ Cascade Rules, Memories Cline вҶ’ .clinerules Factory/Droid вҶ’ .factory/droids/*.md OpenCode вҶ’ .opencode/skill/, opencode.json ``` ### The n-skills Way We embrace the diversity with a universal approach: ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ SKILL.md вҶ’ The universal skill format в”Ӯ в”Ӯ AGENTS.md вҶ’ The universal discovery file в”Ӯ в”Ӯ openskills вҶ’ The universal installer в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Write once. Run everywhere. в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` [AGENTS.md](https://www.infoq.com/news/2025/08/agents-md/) is now adopted by **20,000+ repositories** and natively supported by GitHub Copilot, Google Gemini, OpenAI Codex, Factory Droid, Cursor, and more. **n-skills is a curated marketplace.** Install via [openskills](https://github.com/numman-ali/openskills) or use your agent's native installer вҖ” your choice! --- ## рҹҡҖ Quick Start ### Claude Code ```bash /plugin marketplace add numman-ali/n-skills ``` Then install any skill: ```bash /plugin install orchestration@n-skills /plugin install open-source-maintainer@n-skills /plugin install gastown@n-skills /plugin install dev-browser@n-skills /plugin install zai-cli@n-skills ``` ### OpenSkills (Universal) Works with **every agent**: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, OpenCode, and anything that reads AGENTS.md. ```bash npm i -g openskills openskills install numman-ali/n-skills openskills sync ``` > **New to OpenSkills?** It's the universal skills installer. [Learn more вҶ’](https://github.com/numman-ali/openskills)
Other native installers **Codex:** ```bash $skill-installer https://github.com/numman-ali/n-skills/tree/main/skills/tools/zai-cli ```
--- ## рҹ“Ұ Available Skills | Skill | Category | Source | Description | |:------|:---------|:-------|:------------| | **[orchestration](./skills/workflow/orchestration/)** | `workflow` | native | Multi-agent orchestration with cc-mirror tasks + TodoWrite | | **[open-source-maintainer](./skills/workflow/open-source-maintainer/)** | `workflow` | native | End-to-end GitHub repo maintenance for open-source projects | | **[dev-browser](./skills/automation/dev-browser/)** | `automation` | [SawyerHood](https://github.com/SawyerHood/dev-browser) | Browser automation with persistent page state | | **[gastown](./skills/tools/gastown/)** | `tools` | native | Multi-agent orchestrator (best with Claude Code + Opus) | | **[zai-cli](./skills/tools/zai-cli/)** | `tools` | native | Z.AI vision, search, reader, and GitHub exploration via MCP | > More skills coming soon. Want to contribute? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) --- ## рҹ—ӮпёҸ Categories | Category | What goes here | |:---------|:---------------| | `workflow` | Multi-agent orchestration, task coordination | | `tools` | CLI tools and utilities | | `development` | Language-specific dev assistance | | `productivity` | Workflow automation | | `automation` | Browser, CI/CD, system automation | | `data` | Databases, data processing | | `documentation` | Docs, diagrams, specs | --- ## рҹҺҜ Want to be Featured? This is a **curated** marketplace. Anyone can request to be included, but only **high-quality, real value-add projects** will be considered. **What we're looking for:** - Skills that solve real problems - Clean, well-documented code - Genuine utility for developers - Active maintenance **Not interested in:** - Wrapper skills with no real value - Abandoned or unmaintained projects - Low-effort submissions ### How to Submit 1. Open an [issue](https://github.com/numman-ali/n-skills/issues) with your skill details 2. Explain what it does and why it's valuable 3. If approved, submit a PR following [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) Or DM me on X: [@nummanali](https://x.com/nummanali) --- ## рҹҢҗ Universal Compatibility n-skills works everywhere because we use open standards: | Agent | How it works | Status | |:------|:-------------|:------:| | **Claude Code** | Native plugin system | вң… Native | | **GitHub Copilot** | Reads AGENTS.md directly | вң… Native | | **Codex** | $skill-installer | вң… Native | | **Factory/Droid** | Reads AGENTS.md directly | вң… Native | | **Cursor** | openskills вҶ’ AGENTS.md | вң… Universal | | **Windsurf** | openskills вҶ’ AGENTS.md | вң… Universal | | **Cline** | openskills вҶ’ AGENTS.md | вң… Universal | | **OpenCode** | Native skill support | вң… Native | | **Amp Code** | openskills вҶ’ AGENTS.md | вң… Universal | --- ## рҹ”„ Auto-Sync from Upstream External skills stay in sync with their source repos automatically. ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Your Repo n-skills в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ skills/my-skill/ в”Җв”Җв–ә skills/category/my-skill/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Daily cron syncs your latest changes. в”Ӯ в”Ӯ You maintain ownership. We curate the collection. в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` **How it works:** 1. You maintain your skill in your own repo 2. Add an entry to [`sources.yaml`](sources.yaml) via PR 3. GitHub Actions syncs your skill folder daily 4. Attribution preserved via `.source.json` **Why not submodules?** Submodule hell is real. This approach is simpler and works with openskills, Claude Code, and every other tool without special handling. --- ## рҹ“Ғ Repository Structure ``` n-skills/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ marketplace.json # Claude Code registry в”ңв”Җв”Җ .github/workflows/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ sync-skills.yml # Daily sync automation в”ңв”Җв”Җ scripts/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ sync-external.mjs # Sync engine в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ update-registry.mjs # Registry generator в”ңв”Җв”Җ sources.yaml # External skill manifest в”ңв”Җв”Җ AGENTS.md # Universal discovery в”ңв”Җв”Җ skills/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ automation/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ dev-browser/ # Synced from SawyerHood в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skills/dev-browser/ # SKILL.md lives here в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ tools/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ gastown/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skills/gastown/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ zai-cli/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skills/zai-cli/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ workflow/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ orchestration/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skills/orchestration/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ open-source-maintainer/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ skills/open-source-maintainer/ в””в”Җв”Җ docs/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ skill-format.md # How to write skills в”ңв”Җв”Җ cross-platform.md # Multi-agent compatibility в””в”Җв”Җ categories.md # Category guidelines ``` --- ## рҹ”— Related Projects - **[openskills](https://github.com/numman-ali/openskills)** вҖ” Universal skills installer for all AI agents - **[zai-cli](https://github.com/numman-ali/zai-cli)** вҖ” Z.AI capabilities via CLI and MCP - **[agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)** вҖ” The open standard for AI agent skills ---
**Built for developers who value simplicity.** Apache 2.0 В· Made by [@numman-ali](https://github.com/numman-ali)

summary_zh: дё“дёә AI зј–з ҒеҠ©жүӢжү“йҖ зҡ„з»ҹдёҖжҸ’д»¶еёӮеңәпјҢи§ЈеҶідәҶ Claude CodeгҖҒCopilot зӯүеҗ„з«ҜжҠҖиғҪж јејҸдёҚйҖҡз”Ёзҡ„й—®йўҳпјҢи®©ејҖеҸ‘иҖ…еҶҷдёҖж¬ЎжҸ’д»¶е°ұиғҪи·Ёе№іеҸ°иҝҗиЎҢгҖӮ
